---
title: "OERs for Creators"
format: html

previous:
  href: "../index.html"
  text: "Home"

next:
  href: "Creator-Why OERs Matter.html"
  text: "Why OERs Matter for Creators"
---

### Learning outcomes

By the end of this unit, learners will be able to:

-   Apply the {{< meta glossary.fiveRs >}} to ensure reusability.

-   Apply {{< meta glossary.FAIR >}} when designing educational resources.

-   Select and use appropriate open licences.

-   Structure and share OERs for maximum longevity and adaptability.

[![](images/clipboard-2765196364.png){fig-alt="Go to next page: Creator-Why%20OERs%20Matter.html" fig-align="center" width="50"}](/OERs%20for%20creators/Creator-Why%20OERs%20Matter.html)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: nav-footer
```{=html}
<a href="{{< meta previous.href >}}" aria-label="Go to previous page: {{< meta previous.text >}}">
  <span aria-hidden="true">«</span> {{< meta previous.text >}}
</a>

<a href="{{< meta next.href >}}" aria-label="Go to next page: {{< meta next.text >}}">
  {{< meta next.text >}} <span aria-hidden="true">»</span>
</a>
```
:::
